effects.effect:
You can only activate this card if you have 3+ face-down cards in your FP Zone. 
 
 Once per turn, during the Action Phase: the turn player can Charge 1 [Dinuarian] Vivosaur from their deck, then place a card from their hand into their FP Zone, face-down. 
 Apply this effect if the turn player has "Dynal" in their discard pile: 
• Reduce the FP Cost of [Dinuarian] Vivosaur's Attack Skills by 1 for each card in the turn player's FP Zone, face-down.
